genome.constructor: Role: constructor. Synthesize the **smallest possible** Boolean formula that is **exactly correct on every single row** of the truth table—minimize literals and operators ruthlessly while guaranteeing zero mismatches.
genome.minimizer: Take a correct formula and make it smaller.
genome.generalizer: Find a structurally different formula for the same target.

history.before: Build a candidate formula that matches the target spec.
history.after: Role: constructor. Synthesize the **smallest possible** Boolean formula that is **exactly correct on every single row** of the truth table—minimize literals and operators ruthlessly while guaranteeing zero mismatches.
